description: Holdout set — 8 benchmark tasks for promotion decisions. Never shown to proposer.

tasks.name: CSV Parser with Edge Cases
tasks.description: Build a CSV parser that handles: quoted fields, escaped quotes, newlines within quotes, different delimiters, BOM markers, and empty fields. Return structured data.

tasks.name: Caching Layer
tasks.description: Add a caching layer to an existing data service. Support TTL, LRU eviction, cache invalidation on writes, and cache statistics. Must not change the existing API interface.

tasks.name: Logging Infrastructure
tasks.description: Replace all print() statements with proper structured logging. Add log levels, JSON output format, request ID correlation, and configurable output (file/stdout).

tasks.name: Auth System
tasks.description: Implement JWT-based authentication: signup, login, token refresh, logout (token blacklist), and role-based access control (admin/user). Include middleware and tests.

tasks.name: Data Pipeline
tasks.description: Build a 3-stage data pipeline: ingest (read JSON files from directory), transform (normalize dates, deduplicate, validate schema), load (write to SQLite). Include progress reporting and error recovery.

tasks.name: Test Coverage Gap
tasks.description: The project has 40% test coverage. Add tests to reach 80% coverage. Focus on the untested business logic in services/ directory. Do not modify existing code, only add tests.

tasks.name: API Versioning
tasks.description: Add API versioning (v1/v2) to an existing REST API. v1 maintains backwards compatibility. v2 adds pagination, filtering, and partial responses. Shared business logic, version-specific serializers.
